Notes: Single UPDATE adds a CNAME and an A RR at the same owner name with no prerequisites, testing how the server enforces RFC 2181 CNAME exclusivity when both additions arrive in one message.

Steps.Description: Add both a CNAME and an A RR at alias.campus.edu. in the same UPDATE, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME rrset exists after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A rrset exists after the UPDATE.
